name: SUNHYDROGEN INC. DL -,001
summary: SUNHYDROGEN INC. focuses on developing and commercializing technologies for producing green hydrogen, aiming to provide sustainable and cost-effective hydrogen solutions. They are involved in the renewable energy sector, seeking to reduce carbon emissions through hydrogen production. TICKER: SUNHYDROGEN INC. develops and commercializes green hydrogen production technologies, providing sustainable and cost-effective hydrogen solutions in the renewable energy sector.
